companion.pair_desc: Generate a one-time pairing code (a chat-scoped API token) for a LAN client.
companion.admin_note: Admin only. Each code mints a new token, shown once. Manage or revoke under Settings → API tokens.
companion.shown_once: Shown once. This grants chat access to your Ulises; revoke it in Settings → API tokens (id ...). The device must be on the same network, and the server must bind to your LAN.
companion.qr_unavailable: QR rendering unavailable -- enter the details manually.
